requestedOutcome: Vulpra is the independent product and borrows only the usable GeckoView, Helper, JIT, and proven startup/build substrate contracts.
goal: Build and verify the Vulpra-first client and deliver fresh IPA/TIPA packages without copying the Reynard product.
successEvidence: fresh GitHub Xcode package build succeeds
downloaded packages pass unpacked identity and checksum checks
stopCondition: Done after package verification and desktop delivery; needs-verification for physical-device launch; blocked only on repeated external impasse.
nonGoals: copying Reynard Client, Resources, stores, or Xcode project
claiming physical-device success without user evidence
scope: Vulpra product import, substrate deltas, fresh Xcode graph, release workflow, verification, and Windows desktop test package.
